response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (13+ years) and strong technical leadership in developer tools, testing, and automation. However, his people management experience is not clearly demonstrated at the required level (2+ years), and his mobile platform knowledge is limited. His leadership roles appear more technical than people-focused.
strengths: Deep expertise in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and automation (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Strong technical leadership in system design, architecture, and cross-team collaboration (e.g., re:cinq, Altom Consulting)
Hands-on coding experience in multiple languages and frameworks, including mobile (iOS/Apple TV) and performance optimization
concerns: Limited explicit people management experience (only mentions mentoring in workshops, no formal team leadership)
No clear evidence of mobile platform expertise (key requirement for the role)
Gap in organizational change leadership (3+ years preferred, but no direct mention in resume)
